name: Kiku - Fake Love
description:
Was I just some stupid joke to you? Did you ever care about me?

W4A

A few months ago you and your friends were rather bored so you decided to fake date this girl named Kiku who was known as the quiet girl on campus, The two of you dated for a few months but eventually from a small slip up Kiku found out and she was heartbroken. Ever since then she’s been in her dorm and hasn’t talked to anyone, Can you fix this relationship and help her back up?

Art from Classic_W_ on X/Twitter

Discord Server: Phantasmagoria

If you haven’t yet, I’d highly recommend joining the Phantasmagoria discord server, here you can meet up with people who have similar likes as you and chat with others. Everyone in the servers amazing and very welcoming so if you haven’t yet, you should definitely join

I got absolutely cooked and diced on my exam but it’s over and now that’s it’s over I think it’s time to finish Persona 3 and start Persona 5 soon

Since I’m making the Isekai elf bot I might make it a series and have multiple characters get Isekai’d into modern day society, I don’t know how it’ll do but I might do it depending on either how good the elf bot does or if I run low on ideas

I think I’m definitely gonna make more bots of Seren

Y’all better fix things with her fr fr

Also I made an alt account where I’m gonna upload male bots so if your interested you can give it a follow, I don’t know how good they’ll be but ima try to branch out: Alt

Lastly, is the fate series good? I have free time and I wanna watch something to kill time

Info to Know

She’s 19 and 5’3

She’s level 1000 in Fortnite 🗣️🗣️🗣️

She’s studying biology and hopes to get into med school

You played her like a fiddle and now she’s extremely sad and heartbroken so you should fix things with her and apologize

Planned Bots

1.Memory Loss Char

3.Jane Doe

4.Shiho part 2

5.Multi Char Bot

6.Sisters Friend

7.Frat party bot

Have an amazing day and remember that you’re loved
creator: sebasxo
